Summary: Create Engineering Coding Standards Context Document
Description: Outcome: Team publishes a context document for AI and humans covering naming conventions, folder structure, linting/formatting rules, error handling style, and API response conventions.
Outcome: Team publishes a context document defining chosen navigation model, dashboard interaction model, component usage rules, spacing/typography conventions, and consistency rules.

Summary: Create Data and Security Guardrails Context Document
Description: Outcome: Team publishes a context document defining per-user data ownership, authorization checks, protected route behavior, and prohibited cross-user access patterns.

Summary: Create AI Prompting and Review Context Document
Description: Outcome: Team publishes a context document for how AI-generated code is prompted, reviewed, tested, and approved before merge.
Outcome: Repository has stable frontend/backend structure, shared config, and documented run commands.
Outcome: Lint/format tools are installed and runnable in CI; formatting is consistent across team contributions.
Outcome: Unit test frameworks are set up for frontend and backend with one passing sample test per side.

Summary: Configure CI Pipeline for Build and Test
Description: Outcome: Pull requests run automated build and unit tests; failing checks block merge.
Outcome: Team has documented .env strategy for local/dev/prod without committing secrets.
Outcome: New users can create accounts through a registration form with validation and duplicate-email handling.

Summary: Implement User Login and Session Handling
Description: Outcome: Registered users can sign in and maintain authenticated session state.
Outcome: Users can sign out cleanly and protected data becomes inaccessible until next login.
Outcome: Users can request reset and set a new password through secure token flow.
Outcome: Unauthenticated users are redirected from protected pages and APIs return correct auth errors.
Outcome: API/resource access is constrained to owner account; cross-user reads/writes are blocked.

Summary: Build Global App Shell and Navigation
Description: Outcome: App has consistent navigation and page layout for Dashboard, Profile, Document Library, and Settings.
Outcome: Settings page exists with baseline account settings structure and consistent app-shell behavior.
Outcome: Dashboard home page renders stable structure for job board workspace.

Summary: Implement Basic Job Entity and Storage
Description: Outcome: Job records can be created, stored, and retrieved with user ownership.
Outcome: Dashboard shows job cards with baseline fields (title, company, stage, activity date).
Outcome: Users can create and update job records from dashboard flow.
Outcome: Users can create/update identity/contact fields and summary with persistence.
Outcome: Profile page shows completion status for baseline fields and updates after save.
